# Power Smarter Cross-Channel Campaigns That Personalize in Real Time

Webinar

# Power Smarter Cross-Channel Campaigns That Personalize in Real Time

September 17, 2025

45 minutes

On demand

## Description

The batch-and-blast era is behind us, and brands like Redfin are proving what’s possible with behavior-driven marketing. Redfin has moved almost entirely away from batch emails, relying on AI and dynamic content to deliver hyper-relevant, intent-based messaging. 

Watch this ADWEEK hosted webinar for a tactical conversation on building smarter campaigns with real-time personalization. Learn how marketers at Strava and Redfin are scaling automation, using intent signals to guide messaging, and balancing efficiency with authenticity. 

**Learn how to:** 

*   Scale personalization with real-time triggers 
*   Build for behavior-driven marketing 
*   Move beyond first-name personalization
